name: spanda-kotha
description: Spanda Kotha — a standalone cognitive novel-writing terminal.
author: Chitraspanda Studios (Founder: Subham Ghorui)

scripts.build:electron: esbuild electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts electron/settings-preload.ts electron/store.ts electron/settings-window.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outbase=electron --outdir=dist-electron --out-extension:.js=.cjs && esbuild electron/settings.html --loader=html --outfile=dist-electron/settings.html
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k -n SERVER,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win --mac --linux
